curation_notes: Patch commit identified from v4.5.0 release changelog as d2d2be3e (table: skip paths with unconfigured family in AdjRib.Update). Only 1 non-test source file changed (internal/pkg/table/adj.go). Locations derived from the patch diff: the fix adds nil guards for the adj.table[family] lookup in both Update and UpdateAdjRibOut functions. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern since the AdjRib type is defined solely in adj.go. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed from CWE-476 and the patch clearly adding nil pointer checks.
